content: The general, incrementally evolving agent framework (Topic B) can be reimagined as a self-supervised world model memory agent (Topic A) that bootstraps its own world knowledge by compressing every incremental experience update into hierarchical, retrievable memory, eliminating the need for manually labeled environment data to scale general agent capability. This structure redefines what a "general agent" is: not a fixed problem solver with pre-programmed capabilities, but an autonomous self-supervising system that grows its world understanding entirely through interaction.
